notes: Buyback credit rates are set by each REP's plan terms. Fixed rates change at contract renewal; variable rates track ERCOT wholesale. This file is manually verified monthly. Plan availability confirmed April 2026.

plans.description: Highest fixed buyback rate in Texas at 10¢/kWh — but requires a 5-year contract. Best for homeowners confident in their solar production long-term.
plans.contractNote: 60-month contract required. Credits expire annually. $14.95/month base fee.

plans.description: 7¢/kWh fixed rate — the most popular choice. Available in all 4 TDU territories. Credits never expire and roll over month to month.
plans.contractNote: 12, 24, or 36-month contracts available. Widest TDU coverage.

plans.description: 1:1 retail rate match — you earn the same rate per kWh exported as you pay per kWh consumed (energy charge only, excluding TDU fees). Credits roll monthly up to $1,000.
plans.contractNote: 12 or 36-month contracts. 36-month plan in Oncor territory highly rated.

plans.description: Real-time ERCOT wholesale pricing every 15 minutes — earns the most during summer peak hours (2–7pm). No cap on credits, no expiration. Cash out when balance exceeds $50.
plans.contractNote: Bundled with all standard Octopus plans. Requires TDSP permission-to-operate form.

plans.description: Time-of-use variable rate — earns more when exporting during high-demand hours. Best for homeowners who can shift loads off-peak. Credits roll monthly.
plans.contractNote: 12-month contract. $19.95/month base fee. System must be under 20kW.

plans.description: Three tiers: Essentials (credits capped at your usage), Solar Credit (unlimited fixed credits), or Solar Max (real-time ERCOT wholesale). All plans use 100% renewable backup.
plans.contractNote: 12/24-month or month-to-month. System must be under 50kW. Requires bidirectional meter.
